title: stelis curiosa
intro: Stelis curiosa is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Stelis curiosa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
